# Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct

## Our Pledge

We as contributors and maintainers pledge to make participation in this project
and our community a harassment‑free experience for everyone, regardless of
age, body size, disability, ethnicity, gender identity and expression, level of
experience, nationality, personal appearance, race, religion, or sexual identity
and orientation.

## Our Standards

- **Be respectful.** Use welcoming and inclusive language.
- **Be collaborative.** Critique ideas, not people.
- **Be patient.** Remember that contributors have varying skill levels.
- **No harassment.** Any form of harassment, intimidation, or discrimination is
  unacceptable.

## Enforcement

Instances of abusive, harassing, or otherwise unacceptable behavior may be
reported by contacting the project maintainers at `contact@open‑source‑atelier.dev`.
All complaints will be reviewed and investigated promptly and fairly.

## Attribution

This Code of Conduct is adapted from the [Contributor Covenant][coc] version 2.1.

[coc]: https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/
